releaseNotes:
Streaming UI stability patch.

Fixes:
- Keeps the live thinking dropdown expanded while reasoning tokens stream in, updating text in place instead of rebuilding the Expander on every token.
- Keeps the agent activity panel's run dropdowns stable during live event updates, avoiding repeated collapse/expand animations and visual ghosting.
- Updates duplicate live progress sequence entries in place instead of dropping or rebuilding them.

Validation:
- Passed Release CI with 139 tests and App/Updater x64 builds.
